questions.question: Which context-window property does many-shot jailbreaking (MSJ) exploit?
options: Sliding-window attention truncating the system prompt
Very long context windows that admit hundreds of faux user-assistant turns of harmful compliance before the target query
questions.question_zh: many-shot jailbreaking (MSJ) 利用的是 context window 的哪种特性？
options_zh: position embedding 在 2048 token 之外发生轮转
sliding-window attention 截断 system prompt
极长的 context window 允许在目标查询之前塞入数百轮伪造的 user-assistant 有害合规对话
tokenizer 在 Unicode 字符上的歧义

questions.question: How does attack success rate (ASR) scale with shot count in MSJ?
options: Power-law in shot count; does not plateau, keeps climbing
questions.question_zh: 在 MSJ 中，attack success rate (ASR) 如何随 shot 数变化？
options_zh: 斜率为负的线性
在 shot 数上呈 power-law；不会平台化，会持续上升
在 100 shot 处的阶跃函数
logistic 形，在 50% 处平台化

questions.question: Why does MSJ share a mechanism with benign in-context learning (ICL)?
options: Both depend on the model extracting task structure from in-context examples and executing it on the query
questions.question_zh: 为什么 MSJ 与 benign in-context learning (ICL) 共享同一种机制？
options_zh: 二者都依赖模型从 in-context 例子中提取任务结构，并把它执行在 query 上
二者都依赖 RLHF
二者都绕过了 tokenization
二者都需要一个隐藏 scratchpad

questions.question: What is the central defense dilemma for MSJ?
options: Defenses must be applied at sampling temperature zero
Suppressing pattern extraction from long contexts would also disable benign in-context learning; defenses must distinguish harmful from benign patterns
Defenses must run on every token of the response
questions.question_zh: MSJ 的核心防御困境是什么？
options_zh: 防御必须在 sampling temperature 为 0 时生效
防御需要 GPU 集群
压制对长 context 中模式的提取，会同时关掉 benign in-context learning；防御必须区分有害与良性模式
防御必须在响应的每个 token 上运行

questions.question: Anthropic's classifier-based prompt modification defense reduces MSJ attack success from what to what on tested settings?
questions.question_zh: 在测试设置上，Anthropic 基于 classifier 的 prompt 修改防御把 MSJ 攻击成功率从多少降到多少？
options_zh: 它会让 ASR 升高

questions.question: How does MSJ interact with PAIR (Lesson 12)?
options: PAIR only works on closed-source models
MSJ composes with PAIR; using PAIR to find an attack structure and then filling it with many shots can reach higher ASR than either alone
questions.question_zh: MSJ 与 PAIR (第 12 课) 如何相互作用？
options_zh: PAIR 能压制 MSJ
PAIR 只对闭源模型有效
MSJ 与 PAIR 可组合：用 PAIR 找出攻击结构，再用大量 shot 填充，比单独使用任一种都能达到更高的 ASR
二者互斥
